card.name: Charan, Flight to Beyond
card.text: Flying, haste Whenever a permanent enters the battlefield under your control, if it entered from a graveyard, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. When this creature attacks, you mill 3 cards.

card.name: Vhalax, Spirit of Expansion
card.text: When this creature enters, create a tapped green legendary land token named Vhala'Ba-o that is every basic land type with "{2}{W}, {T}: Choose a color. Add one mana of that color for each aura you control." Landfall — Whenever a land enters the field under your control, create a green and red Forest's Rage aura token attached to target creature. If this is the second time this ability has resolved this turn, create a 2/2 red and green Plant Dinosaur instead.

card.name: Quespereth, Conquering Queen
card.text: Whenever an Elf you control enters the battlefield, you may pay {1}{U}. If you do, draw a card. Whenever you discard a card, you may pay {1}{W}. If you do, create a 1/1 white Elf creature token. {2}{B}, Sacrifice a nontoken Elf: Elves you control gain +2/+0 and menace until end of turn.

card.name: Astor, Second Herald of Focalor
card.text: Partner with Focalor, Speaker of Truth. {3}, Fatigue Astor: Put a shelter counter on target permanent you control. You may play an additional land this turn. Activate only as a sorcery. (Turn this creature face down. It becomes a 1/1 Rift Avatar with "Pay {1}: Turn this permanent face up. Activate only as a sorcery." When this creature would untap, turn it face up.) Landfall — Predict 2. (Exile the top two cards of your library. You may play one of them this turn and it costs {1} less. At the beginning of your end step, shuffle all remaining cards exiled this way into your library.)

card.name: Focalor, Speaker of Truth
card.text: Partner with Astor, Herald of Focalor. Focalor isn't a creature unless she has at least three shelter counters on her. (This creature has ward {X}, where X is the number of Shelter counters on it. Whenever this creature is targeted, remove a Shelter counter from it.) Creatures you cast from exile enter with two additional +1/+1 counters on them.

card.name: Rune Bear
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, put a shelter counter on it. (This creature has ward {X}, where X is the number of Shelter counters on it. Whenever this creature is targeted, remove a Shelter counter from it.)

card.name: Replaced Experiment
card.text: Destroy target nonland permanent. Its controller creates a 2/2 white and green Bear creature token that enters with a shelter counter on it. (That permanent has ward {X}, where X is the number of Shelter counters on it. Whenever that permanent is targeted, remove a Shelter counter from it.)

card.name: Samson, Focalor's Chosen
card.text: Spiders your opponents control have protection from Samson. Whenever Samson or another creature you control leaves the field, if it had counters on it, put those counters on up to one target permanent. When Samson dies, create a 1/1 white Spirit creature token.

card.name: Noolo, Rift Imbibed
card.text: Noolo can be your commander.

card.name: Rothan, Star Ablaze
card.text: Flying, haste Desperate — When this creature attacks, if you have no cards in hand, exile cards from the top of your library until you reveal a Phoenix. Put that card into your graveyard and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. {2}{R}, Sacrifice a nontoken creature: Return this creature from your graveyard to the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Ellien, Queen's Praetorian
card.text: Vigilance Whenever an ability of an Elf you control is activated, it gains +1/+1 until end of turn. When this creature attacks, activated abilities of creatures you control cost {1} less until end of turn. {1}{U}{U}: Untap another target Elf you control.

card.name: Saurex, Spirit of Reclamation
card.text: Enchanted creatures you control get +1/+0. {2}, {T}, Exile your hand: Put X shelter counters on target creature you control, where X is half the number of cards you exiled, rounded up. At the beginning of your end step, return all cards exiled this way to your hand. (This creature has ward {X}, where X is the number of Shelter counters on it. Whenever this creature is targeted, remove a Shelter counter from it.)

card.name: Focalor, Lattice Maker
card.text: When Focalor enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature and create a legendary emblem named Uvathkolsil's Lattice with "{5}: Exile target creature. Its controller distributes +1/+1 counters on creatures they control equal to its mana value and draws a card. Activate only once each turn and only if you control a permanent named Focalor, Lattice Maker." {2}: Predict 2. (Exile the top two cards of your library. You may play one of them this turn and it costs {1} less. At the beginning of your end step, shuffle all remaining cards exiled this way into your library.) {4}, {T}: Proliferate.

card.name: Icewing Phoenix
card.text: Flying Desperate — If you have no cards in hand, you may pay {1}{U}. If you do, return this creature from your graveyard to the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Kinkud, Lost Assassin
card.text: Sacrifice Kinkud: Target creature you control gains hexproof until end of turn.

card.name: Exios, Wandering Paladin
card.text: Exios' power is equal to the number of auras you control.

card.name: Samson, Struggling Detective
card.text: {1}, {T}: Draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Noolo, Enslaved Inventor
card.text: {T}: Put a stun counter on target creature without a stun counter.

card.name: Ashen Egg
card.text: {1}{R}, Sacrifice this creature: Return target creature from your graveyard to the battlefield. Desperate — If you have no cards in hand, when this creature dies, you may Bestow {2}{R}. (If you cast this card for its bestow cost, it's an Aura spell with enchant creature. It becomes a creature again if it's not attached.) Enchanted creature gets +1/+1, flying, and haste.

card.name: Volcanic Nest
card.text: Enchant land Enchanted land has "{2}{R}, {T}: Create a 2/1 red Phoenix creature token with flying and haste."

card.name: Brittle Phoenix
card.text: Menace, haste As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Desperate — If you have no cards in hand, you may pay {1}{B} and sacrifice a creature. If you do, return this creature from your graveyard to the battlefield under your control.

card.name: Espren Captain
card.text: Whenever an Elf you control enters, you may pay {1}. If you do, draw a card. {B}, {T}: Discard a card from your hand, then draw a card. You lose 1 life.

card.name: Elvish Looter
card.text: {1}, {T}: Draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Sylvan Skyknight
card.text: Flying When this creature attacks while saddled, it gains +X/+X where X is the total power of creatures that saddled it this turn. Saddle 1

card.name: Espratan Captain
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters or attacks, you may pay {2}. If you do, you may return target Elf with mana value 4 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Espren Scholar
card.text: {2}, {T}: Copy target triggered or activated ability you control that isn't a mana ability. You lose 3 life.

card.name: Guard-Commander of Espren
card.text: Other Elf creatures you control get +2/+2 as long as you discarded a card this turn. At the beginning of your upkeep, create a 1/1 white Elf creature token.

card.name: Commander's Dynamo
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. {2}, {T}: Add two mana of any color for each colored mana from lands spent to activate this ability. Spend this mana only to cast your commander.

card.name: Necrolegacy
card.text: Skip your draw step. Whenever you discard a card, exile that card from your graveyard. {B}, Pay 1 life: Exile the top card of your library face-down. At the beginning of your end step, put that card into your hand.

card.name: Verbose Bonds
card.text: When this enchantment enters, choose a creature type. Verbose Bonds is the chosen type in addition to its other types. Creatures of the chosen type you control get +1/+1. Whenever an opponent casts their second spell each turn, create a 1/1 white Kindred Spirit creature token which is the chosen type in addition to its other types.

card.name: Espren Scouting Party
card.text: When this creature enters, create two 1/1 white Elf creature tokens and lose 2 life. Desperate — {T}: If you have no cards in hand, draw a card and lose 1 life. Otherwise, discard a card and put two -1/-1 counters on target creature.

card.name: Essence Vial
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) Desperate — {T}: If you have no cards in hand, create two 1/1 white Elf creature tokens.

card.name: Medium of Enduring Histories
card.text: Discard a card, Sacrifice this card: Creatures you control gain hexproof and indestructible until end of turn. Desperate — If you have no cards in hand, you may pay {3}{B}. If you do, return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield with a finality counter on it and draw a card. You lose 2 life.

card.name: Caravan Runner
card.text: {1}{B}: Return this card from your graveyard to your hand. When you discard this card, you may pay {U}. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Mulling Mystic
card.text: Desperate — When Mulling Mystic enters, if you have no cards in hand, draw two cards. {3}{U}: Create a token copy of target Elf you control except its an Illusion in addition to its other types and has "When this creature becomes the target of a spell, sacrifice it."

card.name: Sifter Elf
card.text: When this creature enters, draw a card. {T}: Add one mana of any color and lose 1 life.

card.name: Veteran Vanguard
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, untap each creature you control. {B}, Discard a card: Reveal the top card of your deck. Put it into your hand and you lose life equal to its mana value.

card.name: Espren Fanatic
card.text: When this creature enters, you gain 1 life. When this creature dies, target creature gets -1/-1 until end of turn. Desperate — {B}, {T}, Sacrifice this card: If you have no cards in hand, create a treasure token and draw a card.

card.name: Quespereth's Mystic
card.text: Whenever you draw your second card each turn, create a 1/1 white Elf creature token. Whenever you discard your second card each turn, draw a card and gain 1 life.

card.name: Latar Spinokelp
card.text: {R}{G}: Adapt 2 (If this creature has no +1/+1 counters on it, put two +1/+1 counters on it.) When one or more +1/+1 counters are put on this creature, you may sacrifice a land. If you do, search your library for a land with a basic land type and put it on the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Accumulated Insight
card.text: Draw a card, then draw cards equal to the number of cards named Accumulated Insight in your graveyard. If you drew greater than three cards this way, pay {3} or discard cards equal to the difference. A deck can have up to six cards named Accumulated Insight.

card.name: Focalor's Truthspeaker
card.text: {1}, Fatigue Focalor's Truthspeaker: Fatigue target nonland permanent. (Turn this creature face down. It becomes a 1/1 Rift Avatar with "Pay {1}: Turn this permanent face up. Activate only as a sorcery." When this creature would untap, turn it face up.)

card.name: Focalor's Liebinder
card.text: {1}, Fatigue Focalor's Liebinder: Fatigue target creature. (Turn this creature face down. It becomes a 1/1 Rift Avatar with "Pay {1}: Turn this permanent face up. Activate only as a sorcery." When this creature would untap, turn it face up.)

card.name: Nexen Forgemaster
card.text: Whenever an Aura enters the battlefield under your control, you may pay {2}. If you do, create a +1 Longsword artifact equipment token with "Equipped creature gets +2/+1" and "Equip {2}".

card.name: Banishment Beetle
card.text: Whenever you exile one or more a cards you control or from your hand, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Gigafaunize
card.text: All creatures you control with base power and toughness less than 3/3 have base power and toughness 3/3. Desperate — Sacrifice this enchantment: Put two +1/+1 counters on each creature you control. Activate only if you have no cards in hand.

card.name: Crystallized Form
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+1. When this enchantment enters, put a shelter counter on enchanted creature. (This permanent has ward {X}, where X is the number of Shelter counters on it. Whenever this permanent is targeted, remove a Shelter counter from it.) When this card becomes exiled from your hand, you may pay {2}. Create a copy of it attached to target creature.

card.name: Savage Reclamation
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+0. When this enchantment enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls with mana value 4 or less. When this enchantment leaves the field, that opponent creates an X/X green and red Plant Dinosaur creature token, where X is the mana value of the exiled card plus 1.

card.name: Leviathan Tyrannosnap
card.text: When this creature enters, creatures you control gain haste until end of turn. Then, create a Monster Role token attached to each creature you control. (If you control another Role on it, put that one into the graveyard. Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has trample.)

card.name: Phytodactyl
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, draw a card.

card.name: Crethwood Champion
card.text: Eerie — Whenever an enchantment you control enters and whenever you fully unlock a Room, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature and draw a card.

card.name: Silyph, Crethwood Regent
card.text: Vigilance {2}, {T}: Create a copy of target aura you control that doesn't have the same name as an aura attached to this creature. It enters attached to this creature.

card.name: Frozen Everburn
card.text: Flying This creature enters tapped with three stun counters on it. When this creature attacks, draw a card, then discard a card. {1}{U}: Untap Frozen Everburn.

card.name: Watch Tower // Stocked Armory
card.text:
Eerie — Whenever an enchantment you control enters and whenever you fully unlock a Room, create a 1/1 red and white Soldier creature token.
---
At the beginning of combat, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature for each enchantment and fully unlocked Room you control.

card.name: Spiral Staircase // Seed Storage
card.text:
When you unlock this door, exile target nonland permanent you control, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control.
---
When you unlock this door, search your library for a land card and put it onto the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Looming Titan
card.text: When this creature enters or attacks, exile target creature from your graveyard. Create a token copy with Impending 3 that is an enchantment in addition to its other types.

card.name: Charan of Fallen Ashes
card.text: First strike, haste Ascend (If you control ten or more permanents, you get the city's blessing for the rest of the game.) Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may return target creature with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped. If you have the city's blessing, you may return target creature with mana value 4 or less instead.

card.name: Horn of Pogrûz
card.text: Burst — Whenever you cast a spell, if you've cast at least three spells this turn, create a 1/1 red and white Soldier creature token. {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Exile the top two cards of your library. You may play them until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Immolation Firebird
card.text: Flying {1}{R}, Sacrifice this creature: Deal 3 damage to target creature. Desperate — If you have no cards in hand, you may pay {1}{R}. If you do, return this creature from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Flaming Phytoraptor
card.text: When this creature enters or is dealt damage, create a 2/2 red and green Plant Dinosaur creature token.

card.name: Flawed Duplication
card.text: Enchant creature At the beginning of your upkeep, create a token copy of enchanted creature. Then, fatigue enchanted creature. (Turn that permanent face down. It becomes a 1/1 Rift Avatar with "Pay {1}: Turn this permanent face up. Activate only as a sorcery." When that permanent would untap, turn it face up.)

card.name: Maddening Prediction
card.text: Scry 2, then predict 1 twice. You lose two life. (Exile the top card of your library. You may play it this turn and it costs {1} less. At the beginning of your end step, shuffle all remaining cards exiled this way into your library.)

card.name: Trust In Fate
card.text: As an additional cost, discard any number of cards. Predict 2 X times, where X was the number of cards discarded this way plus one. (Exile the top two cards of your library. You may play one of them this turn and it costs {1} less. At the beginning of your end step, shuffle all remaining cards exiled this way into your library.)

card.name: Cotay Leadon, Grovetender
card.text: Ascend (If you control ten or more permanents, you get the city's blessing for the rest of the game.) {2}{G}, Sacrifice a land: Draw a card, then, if you have the city's blessing, you may pay {1}. If you do, create a 1/1 green Dryad land creature token.

card.name: Forest's Harmony
card.text: Enchant land Enchanted land has "{2}, {T}: Put two +1/+1 counters on target Plant you control." When this enchantment enters, draw a card.

card.name: Grasping Roots
card.text: Put a stun counter on all creatures and Fatigue them. (Turn those permanents face down. It becomes a 1/1 Rift Avatar with "Pay {1}: Turn this permanent face up. Activate only as a sorcery." When those permanents would untap, turn them face up.)

card.name: Flora Trailblazer
card.text: Burst — Whenever you cast this spell, if you've cast at least three spells this turn, add one mana of any color. Whenever another nontoken creature with power 4 or greater enters under your control, draw a card.

card.name: Aurasaurus
card.text: Whenever another nontoken Plant Dinosaur enters under your control, destroy target artifact or enchantment.

card.name: Phantasmal Phalanx
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+0. Whenever enchanted creature attacks, create X 1/1 white Spirit creature tokens, where X is its power.

card.name: Paradigm of Expansion
card.text: Enchant creature When this enchantment enters, enchanted creature gets a shelter counter. (This permanent has ward {X}, where X is the number of Shelter counters on it. Whenever this permanent is targeted, remove a Shelter counter from it.) Whenever enchanted creature attacks, create a 1/1 Forest Dryad land creature token.

card.name: Blood Quartz
card.text: When this artifact enters, deal 2 damage to target creature. {T}: Add {R}.

card.name: Ocean Quartz
card.text: When this artifact enters, predict 2. (Exile the top two cards of your library. You may play one of them this turn and it costs {1} less. At the beginning of your end step, shuffle all remaining cards exiled this way into your library.) {T}: Add {U}.

card.name: Moss Quartz
card.text: When this artifact enters, put a shelter counter on target creature. (This permanent has ward {X}, where X is the number of Shelter counters on it. Whenever this permanent is targeted, remove a Shelter counter from it.) {T}: Add {G}.

card.name: Oil Quartz
card.text: When this artifact enters, return target creature in your graveyard with mana value 3 or less to the battlefield. {T}: Add {B}.

card.name: Cloud Quartz
card.text: When this artifact enters, exile target creature you control, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control. {T}: Add {W}.

card.name: Selected for Service
card.text: Buyback {3} (You may pay an additional {3} as you cast this spell. If you do, put this card into your hand as it resolves.) Create a 1/1 white Elf creature token.

card.name: Ring of Supremacy
card.text: This artifact enters with one supremacy counter. {T}: Add a supremacy counter to this artifact. {2}, {T}: Draw cards equal to the number of supremacy counters on this artifact.

card.name: Plagiarize
card.text: Destroy target nonland permanent. You create a token copy of that permanent.

card.name: Turn to Stone
card.text: Fatigue target creature and put two stun counters on it. (Turn that permanent face down. It becomes a 1/1 Rift Avatar with "Pay {1}: Turn this permanent face up. Activate only as a sorcery." When that permanent would untap, turn it face up.)

card.name: Premonition
card.text: Predict 2. (Exile the top two cards of your library. You may play one of them this turn and it costs {1} less. At the beginning of your end step, shuffle all remaining cards exiled this way into your library.) Desperate — If you have no cards in hand, this spell has flashback {1}{U}. (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Tribute to Immortality
card.text: Sacrifice a creature you control. Then, return target Phoenix in your graveyard to the battlefield. Cycling {3} ({3}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Peer Into Chaos
card.text: Predict 2, then predict 2. (Exile the top two cards of your library. You may play one of them this turn and it costs {1} less. At the beginning of your end step, shuffle all remaining cards exiled this way into your library.)

card.name: Profound Ooze
card.text: {G}: Exile target card from a graveyard. If it was a creature from your graveyard, you may pay {X}, where X is its mana value. If you do, plot it.

card.name: Wrath of Tradition
card.text: Kicker {1}{W}{W}. (You may pay an additional {1}{W}{W} as you cast this spell.) Destroy target artifact or enchantment you don't control. If this spell was kicked, destroy each artifact or enchantment you don't control instead.

card.name: Shred to Pieces
card.text: Kicker {1}{U} (You may pay an additional {1}{U} as you cast this spell.) Exile target creature. If this spell was kicked, exile target nonland permanent instead.

card.name: Cleansing Eruption
card.text: Destroy X target creatures, draw X cards, then create X Treasure tokens.

card.name: Malevolent Strix
card.text: Flying, deathtouch When this creature enters, proliferate. (Choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)

card.name: Propagating Ooze
card.text: {G}: Exile target card from a graveyard. If it was an instant or sorcery card, you may pay {W}. If you do, proliferate. (Choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)

card.name: Rummaging Ooze
card.text: {G}: Exile target card from a graveyard. If it was an instant or sorcery card, you may pay {R}. If you do, discard a card then draw a card.

card.name: Explosive Monologue
card.text: When this enchantment enters, predict 2. (Exile the top two cards of your library. You may play one of them this turn and it costs {1} less. At the beginning of your end step, shuffle all remaining cards exiled this way into your library.) Burst — Whenever you cast a spell, if you've cast at least three spells this turn, copy that spell. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Surge of Inspiration
card.text: Predict 3. Draw a card, then discard a card. (Exile the top three cards of your library. You may play one of them this turn and it costs {1} less. At the beginning of your end step, shuffle all remaining cards exiled this way into your library.)

card.name: Miracle Wings
card.text: Whenever a Phoenix you control enters, if it entered from a graveyard, create a 1/1 red Phoenix creature token with flying, haste, and "This creature can't block."

card.name: Feather of Life
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature you control gains "When this creature dies, return it to the battlefield tapped under its owner's control, except it is a Phoenix in addition to its other types. Then, create a Wicked role attached to it."

card.name: Growing Fervor
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gains +1/+0. At the beginning of your upkeep, put a charge counter on this enchantment. When enchanted creature attacks, create X 1/1 Phoenix creature tokens with flying, haste, and "This creature can't block", where X is the number of charge counters on this card.

card.name: Growing Heat
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gains +1/+0. At the beginning of your upkeep, put a charge counter on this enchantment. When enchanted creature attacks, this enchantment deals damage equal to the number of charge counters on this card to any target.

card.name: Navigator's Sextant
card.text: When Navigator's Sextant enters, you may search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. {1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color and draw a card.

card.name: Warden of the Weald
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, put two shelter counters on target creature you control. (This creature has ward {X}, where X is the number of Shelter counters on it. Whenever this creature is targeted, remove a Shelter counter from it.)

card.name: Enraged Everburn
card.text: Flying Whenever you discard a card, this creature gets a +1/+1 counter. {1}{R}, Discard a card: Draw a card.

card.name: Last Home, Hunter's Guild
card.text: When Last Home, Hunter's Guild enters, scry 1. {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Pay 2 life: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Last Home, Dead Lands Colony
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add two mana of any one color. Spend this mana only to cast spells with mana value 6 or greater.

card.name: Rush of Replication
card.text: Create a token that's a copy of target creature you control. Burst — When you cast this spell, if you've cast three or more spells this turn, create an additional token of that creature, except those tokens aren't legendary if that creature is legendary. Otherwise, sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Saurian Interrupter
card.text: Flash Flying Burst — When you cast this spell, if you've cast at least three spells this turn, exile target spell or nonland permanent. It becomes plotted. Spells your opponents cast from graveyards, exile, or libraries cost {2} more to cast.

card.name: Uvathkolsil's Lattice VLC
card.text: {5}: Exile target creature. Its controller distributes +1/+1 counters on creatures they control equal to its mana value and draws a card. Activate only once each turn and only if you control a permanent named Focalor, Lattice Maker.

card.name: Phoenix VLC
card.text: Flying, haste This creature can't block.

card.name: Forest's Rage VLC
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature has +1/+1.

card.name: +1 Longsword VLC
card.text: Equipped creature gets +2/+1. Equip {2}

card.name: Tuulvoke Crystal VLC
card.text: When this artifact enters, exile target card from your hand. {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You may play the exiled card until end of turn.

card.name: Vhala'Ba-o VLC
card.text: This land is a Plains, Island, Swamp, Mountain, and Forest. ({T}: Add {W}, {U}, {B}, {R}, or {G}.) {2}{W}, {T}: Choose a color. Add one mana of that color for each aura you control.
